Target Patient Population: Adults with advanced renal cell carcinoma (RCC) following prior PD-1/PD-L1 and VEGF targeted therapies
Key Efficacy Claim: Welireg Efficacy: 22% Objective Response Rate (ORR) (LITESPARK-005 study)
Key Safety Parameter: Welireg Safety Profile: 30% Grade 3/4 Adverse Reactions (including anemia and hypoxia)
Core Marketing Hook: Pioneering HIF-2α inhibition to deliver breakthroughs in advanced RCC.
